uplink.description: All sensors present (temp/humidity, barometer, CO2, battery) - synthetic in-bounds payload
uplink._note: Synthetic Decentlab v2 payload (device id 0x1234, flags 0b1111) hand-built to exercise every sensor block with distinct in-bounds values; expected.data derived from running reference/upstream-codec.js through this module's normalization (pressure 101300 Pa -> 1013 hPa atmospheric, co2 800 ppm, battery 3.3 V).

uplink.description: All sensors present - upstream example 1 input, normalized
uplink._note: Input bytes are the upstream Apache-2.0 dl-lp8p example 1 (in-bounds); expected.data authored here by running reference/upstream-codec.js and mapping its raw per-sensor values onto the vocabulary (barometric_pressure 96800 Pa -> 968 hPa atmospheric).

uplink.description: Battery only (flags clear all sensor bits except battery)
uplink._note: Input bytes are the upstream Apache-2.0 dl-lp8p example 3 (flags 0b1000); expected.data authored here from reference/upstream-codec.js (battery_voltage 3109 mV -> 3.109 V).

uplink.description: Protocol version mismatch - first byte is not 2
uplink._note: Synthetic: version byte set to 1; the Decentlab decoder rejects any version other than 2 (matches upstream PROTOCOL_VERSION guard).

uplink.description: Short payload - fewer than 5 header bytes
uplink._note: Synthetic: truncated header (3 bytes); decoder requires at least the 5-byte version/device-id/flags header.
